verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus bids us shine With a pure, clear light; Like a little candle Burning in the night. In this world of darkness, So we must shine - You in your small corner, And I in mine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus bids us shine, First of all for Him; Well He sees and knows it If our light grows dim. He looks down from heaven To see us shine - You in your small corner, And I in mine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus bids us shine, Then, for all around; Many kinds of darkness In this world abound Sin and want and sorrow; so we must shine - You in your small corner And I in mine
